JCPenney Brings Its Battle Against Fashion Elitism to Women’s Basketball

JCPenney가 여성 농구를 통해 패션 엘리트주의에 맞서는 마케팅 캠페인을 전개하고 있습니다. 'Inside Lane'이라는 캠페인을 통해 좋은 스타일이 비싸지 않아도 된다는 메시지를 전달하고 있습니다. 여성 스포츠 마케팅을 통해 브랜드의 접근성과 포용성을 강조하는 전략입니다.
JCPenney is using women's basketball to battle fashion elitism through marketing campaigns. The 'Inside Lane' campaign extends their message that great style doesn't have to be expensive. The strategy emphasizes brand accessibility and inclusivity through women's sports marketing.

  • Inside Lane campaign message
  • Fighting fashion elitism
  • Emphasizing style accessibility

D2C brands can build differentiated positioning by emphasizing inclusivity and accessibility through sports marketing.

TD SYNNEX Q1 revenue surpasses expectations

IT distributor TD SYNNEX reported record revenue in fiscal Q1 2026, surpassing expectations. Revenue reached $17.2 billion, an 18% increase over the same period in the previous year. The company attributed growth to continued demand and successful artificial intelligence integration.

  • 18% year-over-year growth exceeded projections
  • AI integration identified as key growth driver

AI search adoption splits along income lines

AI search tool adoption is splitting along income lines with higher-income audiences adopting AI faster. This is fragmenting search behavior and reshaping decision-making processes before users even click. The trend is creating new challenges for marketers as valuable customer segments change their search patterns.

  • Higher-value audiences are early AI adopters
  • Search behavior fragmentation is occurring
  • Decision-making processes are changing pre-click

Walmart-owned Flipkart, Amazon are squeezing India’s quick commerce startups

월마트 소유의 플립카트와 아마존이 인도 주요 도시를 넘어 확장하며 대대적인 할인을 통해 시장 점유율을 확대하고 있습니다. 이러한 공격적 전략으로 인해 인도의 퀵 커머스 스타트업들이 경쟁 압박을 받고 있다고 분석가들이 지적했습니다. 대형 플레이어들의 자본력을 바탕으로 한 시장 장악이 소규모 업체들의 생존을 위협하고 있습니다.
Walmart-owned Flipkart and Amazon are expanding beyond major cities in India while implementing heavy discounting strategies to gain market share. Analysts indicate that these aggressive tactics are putting pressure on India's quick commerce startups. The capital-backed market domination by large players is threatening the survival of smaller competitors.
  • Flipkart and Amazon expanding beyond tier-1 cities in India
  • Heavy discounting strategy pressuring quick commerce startups
  • Capital advantage enabling market consolidation
  • Competitive risks for smaller players in quick commerce sector
💡 So What
LG는 인도 D2C 시장 진출 시 대형 플랫폼과의 경쟁보다는 차별화된 고객 경험과 프리미엄 포지셔닝을 통한 독자적 채널 구축이 필요합니다.
LG should focus on building differentiated customer experiences and premium positioning through independent channels rather than competing directly with major platforms in the Indian D2C market.

  • Location-based data improves store operations and customer experience

Research from Omnisend shows that consumer trust in online product reviews is increasing despite the widespread presence of AI 'slop'. Marketing forecast fundamentals every growth team needs

마케팅 예측은 과거 데이터와 전환 가정을 사용하여 리드, 파이프라인, 수익과 같은 미래 마케팅 결과를 추정합니다. 마케팅 예측은 계획된 활동을 예상 결과와 연결하여 캠페인 실행 전에 성과를 예측할 수 있도록 도와줍니다. 이러한 접근 방식은 더 명확한 계획, 예측 가능한 성장, 마케팅 투입과 수익 목표 간의 강력한 정렬을 지원합니다.
Marketing forecasting estimates future marketing results such as leads, pipeline, and revenue using historical data and conversion assumptions. Marketing forecasting connects planned activities to expected outcomes, helping teams understand likely performance before campaign execution. This approach supports clearer planning, more predictable growth, and stronger alignment between marketing inputs and revenue targets.
  • Marketing forecasts use historical data and conversion assumptions
  • Connects planned activities to expected outcomes
  • Enables performance prediction before campaign execution
  • Supports alignment between marketing inputs and revenue targets
💡 So What

Accurate marketing forecasting capabilities enable D2C brands to improve marketing investment efficiency and enhance strategic decision-making for revenue target achievement.

Most marketing teams have access to AI tools but struggle to achieve meaningful results. The issue lies not in the tools themselves but in where they are applied. Using AI and extracting value from AI are different challenges entirely.

AI adoption fails at the human level

AI 도입의 가장 큰 장벽은 기술이 아니라 인간적 요소인 두려움, 위험 인식, 과거 경험이다. 팀이 AI 도입을 주저하는 진짜 이유를 이해하고 해결하는 것이 중요하다. 기술적 준비보다 인간의 심리적 저항을 먼저 다뤄야 한다.
The biggest barrier to AI adoption is not technology but human factors including fear, risk perception, and past experience. Understanding and addressing the real reasons teams hesitate to adopt AI is crucial. Human psychological resistance must be addressed before technical readiness.
  • Human factors are the primary barrier to AI adoption
  • Fear and risk perception outweigh technical challenges
  • Past experiences influence team resistance
  • Change management crucial for successful AI implementation
💡 So What
LG D2C는 AI 도입 시 기술 교육뿐만 아니라 직원들의 두려움과 우려를 해소하는 변화 관리 프로그램을 우선 시행해야 한다.
LG D2C should prioritize change management programs that address employee fears and concerns, not just technical training for AI adoption.

AI-driven creative campaigns from brands like Coca-Cola and Svedka are failing due to poor execution that undermines the value of AI-generated content. Generative AI should be used in ways that support storytelling rather than replace it. Strategic approaches are needed for successful AI creative implementation.

  • GenAI should support rather than replace storytelling
  • Strategic implementation crucial for AI creative success
  • Quality over automation approach needed

LG D2C should focus on creative quality over automation when adopting AI creative tools, using them to enhance brand storytelling.

AI 마케팅의 다음 시대는 단순한 규모 확장이 아닌 공감과 인간 중심의 경험 설계가 핵심이다. 마케팅 시스템에서 AI의 진정한 기회는 고객과 팀 모두의 마찰을 줄이는 경험을 만드는 것이다. 기술적 효율성과 인간적 공감을 결합한 마케팅 접근법이 필요하다.
The next era of AI marketing is defined not by scale alone but by empathy and human-centered experience design. The real opportunity with AI in marketing systems lies in creating experiences that reduce friction for both customers and teams. A marketing approach combining technological efficiency with human empathy is essential.

  • Experience design should reduce friction for customers and teams
  • Human-centered approach is crucial for next-generation marketing systems

아마존이 연료비와 물류 비용 상승으로 인해 풀필먼트 서비스에 3.5% 할증료를 부과한다고 발표했다. 이 할증료는 미국과 캐나다의 FBA 서비스와 일부 크로스보더 및 바이 위드 프라임 서비스에 적용된다. 물류 비용 상승이 전체 이커머스 생태계에 미치는 영향이 가시화되고 있다.
Amazon announced it will impose a 3.5% surcharge on fulfillment services due to rising fuel and logistics costs. The surcharge applies to Fulfillment by Amazon services in the U.S. and Canada, as well as some cross-border and Buy With Prime services. The impact of rising logistics costs on the entire e-commerce ecosystem is becoming visible.
  • Amazon implementing 3.5% surcharge on fulfillment services
  • Rising fuel and logistics costs driving the increase
  • Affects FBA, cross-border, and Buy With Prime services
  • Impacts sellers across U.S. and Canadian markets
💡 So What
D2C 기업들은 아마존 FBA 의존도를 재검토하고 물류 비용 상승에 대비한 다각화된 풀필먼트 전략을 수립해야 한다.
D2C companies should reassess their Amazon FBA dependency and develop diversified fulfillment strategies to prepare for rising logistics costs.

Shopify가 D2C 상인들을 위해 B2B 기능을 확장한다고 발표했습니다. 'basic', 'grow', 'advanced' 플랜 사용자들이 추가 비용 없이 B2B 기능에 액세스할 수 있게 됩니다. Shopify Plus가 아닌 플랜의 상인들도 이제 B2B 기능을 사용할 수 있습니다.
Shopify announced it is extending business-to-business features to its direct-to-consumer merchants. Merchants using 'basic,' 'grow,' and 'advanced' plans now have access to B2B features at no extra cost. Merchants on plans other than Shopify Plus can now utilize B2B capabilities.
  • Shopify extending B2B features to DTC merchants
  • No additional cost for basic, grow, and advanced plan users
  • Expansion beyond Shopify Plus for B2B capabilities
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드들이 추가 비용 없이 B2B 시장으로 확장할 수 있는 기회가 생겼으며, 이를 통해 새로운 수익원을 개발할 수 있습니다.
D2C brands now have the opportunity to expand into B2B markets without additional costs, enabling new revenue stream development.

Amazon to apply 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge on fulfillment

아마존이 이란 전쟁으로 인한 연료비 상승을 이유로 2026년 FBA 서비스에 3.5%의 연료 및 물류 할증료를 적용한다고 발표했습니다. 이는 미국 FBA 서비스 기준 단위당 평균 7센트의 비용 증가를 의미합니다. 공급망 전반에 걸쳐 연료비 부담이 증가하고 있는 상황입니다.
Amazon announced a 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge on Fulfillment by Amazon services due to rising fuel costs from the Iran war. The increase averages 7 cents per unit for U.S. FBA services. Supply chains are grappling with elevated fuel costs across the industry.
  • 3.5% fuel surcharge on Amazon FBA services starting 2026
  • Average 7 cents per unit increase for U.S. fulfillment
  • Rising fuel costs linked to Iran war impact supply chains
💡 So What

HubSpot moves to outcome-based pricing for some Breeze AI agents

Retail media's initial growth momentum is slowing as the industry faces new challenges. Trade budget reductions, uneven measurement practices, and AI's reshaping of discovery are forcing a more complex growth path. The industry needs new strategies and solutions for sustainable growth.

  • AI is fundamentally changing product discovery mechanisms
  • Measurement inconsistencies challenge advertising effectiveness
  • Industry requires new strategies for sustainable growth

Building an AI competitive edge through strategy and governance

AI는 대규모 콘텐츠 생성이 가능하지만 방향성 제시는 불가능합니다. 더 나은 입력값, 독점 데이터, 명확한 가이드라인이 강력한 AI 성과를 이끕니다. 전략과 거버넌스를 통한 AI 경쟁 우위 구축 방법을 제시합니다.

  • AI는 콘텐츠 생성은 가능하나 전략적 방향성 부족
  • 독점 데이터와 명확한 가이드라인 중요

MIT Technology Review (AI)
TechStrategyai-evaluationhuman-ai-collaborationbenchmark-limitations

AI benchmarks are broken. Here’s what we need instead.

기존 AI 벤치마크는 개별 작업에서 인간 대비 AI 성능을 측정하는 방식으로 한계가 있습니다. 실제 AI 활용에서는 인간과 AI의 협업이 중요하지만 현재 평가 체계는 이를 반영하지 못합니다. AI 평가 방식의 근본적 재설계가 필요한 상황입니다.
Current AI benchmarks focus on comparing AI performance against humans on isolated tasks, which has significant limitations. Real-world AI applications emphasize human-AI collaboration rather than replacement, but existing evaluation frameworks don't capture this. A fundamental redesign of AI evaluation methods is needed.
  • Traditional AI benchmarks compare machines vs humans on isolated tasks
  • Real-world AI success depends on human-AI collaboration, not replacement
  • Current evaluation frameworks fail to capture practical AI implementation value
💡 So What
D2C 기업은 AI 도구 도입 시 벤치마크 점수보다는 실제 업무 환경에서의 인간-AI 협업 효과를 중심으로 평가해야 합니다.
D2C companies should evaluate AI tools based on human-AI collaboration effectiveness in real work environments rather than relying on benchmark scores.

Samsung Galaxy S26's Photo Assist app can distort memories through AI editing capabilities that build on Google Pixel 9's foundation. Natural language requests enable almost any image modification, making it easy to create images of events that never happened. This raises concerns about the authenticity of digital memories and potential misuse.

  • Natural language prompts can bypass guardrails to create misleading content
  • Raises concerns about digital memory authenticity and potential harmful image generation

Page Authority: How to Build Pages That Rank

페이지 권한(Page Authority) 점수가 높다고 항상 검색 순위가 좋은 것은 아닙니다. 실제로는 낮은 PA 점수를 가진 경쟁사에게 순위에서 밀리는 경우도 발생합니다. SEO 전략에서 PA는 하나의 참고 지표일 뿐이며 전체적인 콘텐츠 품질과 최적화가 더 중요합니다.
High Page Authority scores don't always guarantee better search rankings, as competitors with lower PA can still outrank higher-scoring pages. PA should be treated as one reference metric rather than the definitive measure of SEO success. Overall content quality and optimization strategies matter more than PA scores alone.
  • Page Authority scores don't directly correlate with search ranking success
  • Lower PA competitors can outrank higher PA pages
  • Comprehensive SEO strategy matters more than individual metrics
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드는 PA 점수에만 의존하지 말고 고품질 콘텐츠 제작과 종합적인 SEO 최적화에 집중해야 합니다.
D2C brands should focus on creating high-quality content and comprehensive SEO optimization rather than relying solely on PA metrics.

Shifting to AI model customization is an architectural imperative

Large language models have shifted from massive 10x performance jumps to incremental gains between iterations. Domain-specialized intelligence remains the exception where true step-function improvements still occur. Organizations are finding competitive advantage by fusing AI models with their specific data and requirements.
  • LLM performance improvements have plateaued from exponential to incremental gains
  • Domain-specialized AI still shows significant step-function improvements
  • Custom model integration with organizational data creates competitive advantage
💡 So What
D2C 기업은 범용 AI 모델보다는 자사 고객 데이터와 비즈니스 로직을 결합한 맞춤형 AI 솔루션 개발에 집중해야 합니다.

Ulta doubled its store fulfillment capabilities in 2025 by expanding its ship-from-store program to 1,000 locations. The beauty retailer maintained the same fulfillment center footprint as 2024 while focusing on store-based shipping. AI has penetrated every aspect of the music industry from sample sourcing to playlist creation. However, ethical controversies are growing including copyright lawsuits, inability to identify AI music, and concerns about threats to musicians' livelihoods.

Bluesky’s new app is an AI for customizing your feed

Bluesky's team has launched 'Attie', an AI assistant that allows users to customize their feeds using natural language. Built on Anthropic's Claude and the AT Protocol, it enables custom feed creation through conversational commands. Currently available as a standalone app, it plans to expand to Bluesky and other atproto applications.

  • Built on Anthropic's Claude and AT Protocol infrastructure
  • Plans to expand from standalone app to broader platform integration

MCP Shifts AI from Chat to Work

모델 컨텍스트 프로토콜(MCP)이 AI를 단순한 채팅 도구에서 실제 비즈니스 운영자로 전환시키는 변화를 이끌고 있습니다. 이는 AI가 비즈니스 워크플로우에 더 깊이 통합되어 실질적인 업무를 수행할 수 있게 하는 기술적 진보를 의미합니다. 전자상거래 영역에서 AI의 역할이 대화형 지원에서 업무 자동화로 확장되고 있습니다.
Model Context Protocol (MCP) is driving a shift from AI as a chat tool to an operator in business operations. This represents technological advancement that enables deeper AI integration into business workflows for actual work execution. The role of AI in e-commerce is expanding from conversational support to work automation.
  • MCP shifts AI from chat to business operation roles
  • Enables deeper AI integration into business workflows
  • Transforms AI from conversational tool to work automation
💡 So What
D2C 기업들은 MCP 기술을 활용해 AI를 단순 고객 서비스를 넘어 주문 처리, 재고 관리, 마케팅 자동화 등 핵심 업무 영역에 통합하여 운영 효율성을 높일 수 있습니다.
D2C companies can leverage MCP technology to integrate AI beyond customer service into core business operations like order processing, inventory management, and marketing automation for enhanced operational efficiency.

Why OpenAI killed Sora

OpenAI가 비디오 생성 앱 Sora를 중단하고 ChatGPT 내 비디오 생성 계획을 철회한다고 발표했습니다. 10억 달러 규모의 디즈니 계약도 종료하며 추가로 100억 달러를 투자 유치했습니다. Sora는 막대한 컴퓨팅 자원을 소모했지만 수익성을 입증하지 못했습니다.
OpenAI announced it would discontinue its video-generation app Sora and reverse plans for video generation in ChatGPT. The company also wound down a $1 billion Disney deal while raising an additional $10 billion from investors. Sora consumed massive compute resources without justifying financial returns.
  • OpenAI shutting down Sora video generation
  • $1 billion Disney deal terminated
  • High compute costs without sufficient ROI

A Manhattan Associates study found that only 7% of specialty retailers have achieved 'leader' status in unified commerce maturity. The research was conducted by Manhattan Associates with Incisiv for the 2026 Global Unified Commerce Benchmark report.

AI company Anthropic sued the Pentagon over its designation as a supply chain risk. A federal judge granted Anthropic a preliminary injunction to temporarily block the government blacklisting. Shipping costs are rising again as UPS and FedEx rely more heavily on surcharges rather than base rate increases to offset higher fuel, labor, and network costs. AI 인플루언서가 단순한 참신함에서 수익성 높은 산업으로 발전하면서 'AI 올해의 인물' 어워드가 새롭게 등장했습니다. OpenArt, Fanvue, ElevenLabs가 공동 주최하는 이 대회는 AI 인플루언서 뒤의 창작 인재를 기념하고 그들의 상업적 영향력을 인정합니다. 한 달간 진행되는 이 대회는 AI 인플루언서 경제의 성숙화를 보여주는 상징적 이벤트입니다.
AI influencers are evolving from quirky novelties into a serious and lucrative industry with the launch of an 'AI Personality of the Year' award. The contest is jointly organized by OpenArt, Fanvue, and ElevenLabs to celebrate creative talent behind AI influencers and recognize their growing commercial clout. This month-long competition represents a symbolic milestone in the maturation of the AI influencer economy.
  • AI influencer industry transforming from novelty to serious business
  • Joint venture between major AI platforms launching award competition
  • Recognition of creative talent behind AI personalities
  • Growing commercial and cultural influence of AI influencers
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드는 AI 인플루언서를 활용한 마케팅 전략을 본격적으로 검토해야 할 시점입니다.
D2C brands should seriously consider incorporating AI influencers into their marketing strategies as this space professionalizes.

Alibaba has announced a target of $100 billion in AI and cloud revenue over the next five years as part of its vision for the agentic era. This ambitious plan comes as the company's strategy for AI-driven growth becomes more focused and concrete. The announcement follows quarterly earnings that fell below analyst expectations, highlighting the company's commitment to AI transformation.

The News/Media Alliance signed an AI licensing deal allowing its 2,200 publisher members to opt into monetizing RAG-driven enterprise demand. This initiative aims to unlock recurring RAG revenue streams for small and mid-sized publishers. The agreement enables publishers to participate in new AI-powered revenue models.

What happens when agency execs negotiate against AI agents

광고 거래에서 AI 에이전트가 구매자와 판매자를 대표하는 게임이 개발되어 실제 에이전시 임원들이 테스트했습니다. Wpromote의 Skyler McGill과 Butler/Till의 Ryan Lammela가 이 AI 협상 시스템을 직접 체험했습니다. 이는 광고 업계에서 AI 에이전트를 활용한 자동화된 협상의 실현 가능성을 탐색하는 실험입니다.
A game has been created where AI agents represent buyers and sellers in advertising deals, tested by actual agency executives. Wpromote's Skyler McGill and Butler/Till's Ryan Lammela participated in testing this AI negotiation system. This represents an exploration of the feasibility of automated AI-driven negotiations in the advertising industry.

Elon Musk announced plans to build a Terafab chip manufacturing plant in Austin, Texas. The facility will be jointly operated by Tesla and SpaceX to produce chips at scale for robotics, AI, and space-based data centers. This move addresses chip demand concerns from the AI industry boom, though it requires billions in investment and many years to complete.

Online pharmacy HealthWarehouse.com returned to profitability in 2025 with revenue increasing 46% to $49.0 million. Robust growth in the business-to-business prescription segment drove the revenue increase. However, the company expects GLP-1 drug market changes to impact 2026 results.

Lululemon gets help from international and digital sales in Q4

Foot Locker is expanding its ecommerce reach through a partnership with DoorDash for on-demand delivery. The collaboration allows customers to order sneakers, apparel, and accessories from Foot Locker, Kids Foot Locker, and Champs Sports locations through DoorDash. This strategy extends their reach beyond their own digital channels.

Samsonite reported fourth-quarter sales growth of 2.2% to $963.3 million compared to the previous year. The company's ecommerce and direct-to-consumer channels helped offset weaker wholesale demand. This marked a return to modest growth after experiencing sales declines earlier in 2025.

Amazon is making an Alexa phone

아마존이 파이어폰 단종 10년 후 알렉사 중심의 새로운 스마트폰 개발을 계획하고 있습니다. '트랜스포머'라는 코드명의 이 기기는 AI 어시스턴트에 중점을 두지만 알렉사가 주 운영체제는 아닐 예정입니다. 마이크로소프트 출신 J 알라드가 이끄는 ZeroOne 그룹에서 개발 중입니다.
Amazon is planning to launch a new smartphone focused on Alexa over 10 years after discontinuing the Fire Phone. Code-named 'Transformer,' the device will center around Amazon's AI assistant but Alexa won't necessarily be the primary operating system. It's being developed by Amazon's ZeroOne group led by former Microsoft executive J Allard.
  • Amazon developing Alexa-focused smartphone after 10+ years
  • Code-named 'Transformer' with AI assistant as centerpiece
  • Led by former Microsoft Xbox/Zune executive J Allard
  • Exploring both smartphone and minimalist phone designs

Google has started replacing news headlines in search results with AI-generated ones. Multiple examples show Google changing headlines from their original versions, sometimes altering their meaning. This follows similar changes in Google Discover and now extends to traditional '10 blue links' search results.

  • Impact on web publisher control over their content presentation

OpenAI is developing a desktop superapp that combines ChatGPT, Codex AI coding app, and Atlas browser into one unified application. CEO Fidji Simo stated that fragmentation has been hindering quality standards and slowing progress. This consolidation strategy comes amid increased competition from Anthropic.

Trump takes another shot at dismantling state AI regulation

트럼프 행정부가 금요일 AI 규제에 대한 새로운 7개 항목 입법 청사진을 발표했습니다. 연방 정부는 아동 안전 규정을 제외하고는 AI 규제를 피해야 하며, 각 주가 글로벌 AI 지배력 달성을 위한 국가 전략을 방해하는 것을 금지해야 한다고 명시했습니다. 이 계획은 AI 서비스를 사용하는 미성년자 보호를 위한 더 많은 안전장치와 AI 인프라로 인한 전기 비용 급등 방지 조치를 의회에 권고합니다.
The Trump administration unveiled a seven-point AI regulation blueprint on Friday, emphasizing federal restraint in AI regulation beyond child safety rules. The plan bars states from interfering with the national strategy to achieve global AI dominance. It advises Congress to protect minors using AI services and prevent electricity cost spikes from AI infrastructure.
  • Seven-point AI regulation blueprint emphasizing federal restraint
  • States barred from interfering with national AI strategy
  • Focus on child safety protections and electricity cost prevention
💡 So What
연방 차원의 AI 규제 완화는 D2C 기업들이 AI 기술을 더 자유롭게 활용할 수 있는 환경을 조성할 것으로 예상됩니다.
Federal deregulation of AI could create a more permissive environment for D2C companies to leverage AI technologies freely.

Cloudflare’s compliant crawler highlights tension – and opportunity – in the emerging AI content market

Cloudflare is struggling to balance trust, control, and monetization while serving as an intermediary between publishers and AI companies. The company's new compliant crawler highlights both opportunities and tensions in the emerging AI content market. This demonstrates the complex role platforms play in the AI content ecosystem and their responsibility in managing relationships between content creators and AI firms.
  • Cloudflare acts as intermediary between publishers and AI companies

Now everyone in the US is getting Google’s personalized Gemini AI

구글이 미국 내 모든 사용자에게 개인화된 제미나이 AI의 Personal Intelligence 기능을 확대 제공한다고 발표했습니다. 이전에는 Google AI Pro 및 Ultra 구독자에게만 제한되었던 기능입니다. 이 기능은 YouTube, Google Photos, Gmail 등 연결된 앱의 데이터를 활용해 제미나이의 응답과 제안에 맥락을 제공합니다.
Google announced that all US users will now have access to Gemini AI's Personal Intelligence feature, which was previously limited to AI Pro and Ultra subscribers. The feature uses data from connected apps like YouTube, Google Photos, and Gmail to provide context for Gemini's responses and suggestions. It's available through AI Mode in Search, Gemini in Chrome, and the Gemini app for personal accounts only.
  • Personal Intelligence feature expanded to all US users from premium-only access
  • Integrates data from multiple Google apps for contextual AI responses
  • Currently limited to personal accounts, not business or enterprise users

Nvidia’s DLSS 5 is like motion smoothing for video games, but worse

엔비디아가 2018년 실시간 레이 트레이싱 이후 가장 중요한 컴퓨터 그래픽 혁신이라고 설명한 DLSS 5를 공개했습니다. 이 기술은 픽셀에 사실적인 조명과 재질을 주입한다고 하지만, 실제로는 인식 가능한 얼굴들을 AI가 생성한 것 같은 모습으로 변형시킵니다. 레지던트 이블과 호그와트 레거시 캐릭터들이 부자연스럽게 변형되는 문제가 지적되고 있습니다.
Nvidia unveiled DLSS 5, described as the company's most significant computer graphics breakthrough since real-time ray tracing in 2018. The technology claims to infuse pixels with photoreal lighting and materials, but actually transforms recognizable faces into AI-generated-looking appearances. Characters from Resident Evil and Hogwarts Legacy appeared unnaturally altered, drawing criticism.
  • DLSS 5 represents major advancement in AI upscaling technology
  • Technology creates unnatural facial transformations despite quality claims
  • Consumer reception highlights importance of realistic AI implementation
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드들은 AI 기반 시각 기술을 도입할 때 고객 경험의 자연스러움과 브랜드 신뢰도를 신중히 고려해야 합니다.
D2C brands must carefully consider naturalness of customer experience and brand credibility when implementing AI-powered visual technologies.

Hotels.com launched a new global campaign emphasizing that its brand name is refreshingly literal and straightforward. The campaign focuses on the direct and honest nature of the brand name itself. This represents a shift toward simplicity and clarity in branding strategy rather than complex marketing messaging.

  • Campaign focuses on simplicity and directness
  • Shift away from complex marketing messaging

Three Tennessee teens are suing Elon Musk's xAI, claiming the Grok AI chatbot generated sexualized images and videos of them as minors. Traditional automation approaches pursued by manufacturers for decades to drive efficiency, reduce costs, and stabilize operations are reaching their limits. Manufacturing leaders now face new challenges of growing amid labor constraints, rising complexity, and pressure to innovate faster. Physical AI is emerging as manufacturing's next competitive advantage that can address these issues while maintaining safety, quality, and trust.

  • Addresses labor constraints while maintaining quality and safety
  • Enables faster innovation without sacrificing trust

Advances in physical AI technology require D2C brands to consider AI-powered production capabilities when selecting manufacturing partners, making smart manufacturing ecosystem development a key competitive advantage for quality and efficiency.

마이크로소프트가 올해 현세대 Xbox 콘솔에 게이밍 코파일럿 AI 어시스턴트를 출시할 예정이라고 발표했습니다. 이 AI 어시스턴트는 Xbox 모바일 앱, Windows 11, Xbox Ally 핸드헬드에서 베타 테스트 중이며, 플레이어들이 게임에서 막혔을 때 음성으로 도움을 요청할 수 있습니다. Xbox는 더 많은 서비스에도 이 어시스턴트를 추가할 계획입니다.
Microsoft announced that its Gaming Copilot AI assistant will launch on current-generation Xbox consoles this year. The AI assistant is currently in beta testing on Xbox mobile app, Windows 11, and Xbox Ally handhelds, allowing players to use voice commands for help when stuck in games. Xbox plans to expand the assistant to more gaming services in the future.
  • Xbox Gaming Copilot launching on current-gen consoles in 2026
  • Voice-activated AI assistant helps players when stuck in games
  • Currently in beta on mobile app, Windows 11, and handhelds
  • Plans to expand to more gaming services
💡 So What
게임 업계의 AI 어시스턴트 통합은 D2C 브랜드들이 제품 발견과 사용자 지원에 음성 기반 AI를 활용할 수 있는 새로운 기회를 제시합니다.
The integration of AI assistants in gaming demonstrates new opportunities for D2C brands to leverage voice-based AI for product discovery and customer support.

War escalation raises shipping costs and delivery risks for B2B sellers

중동 전쟁 확산으로 인해 글로벌 배송 네트워크가 혼란을 겪고 있다. 미국과 이스라엘의 이란 전쟁으로 항공 운송비 상승과 배송 불확실성이 증가했다. B2B 이커머스 채널을 통해 판매하는 미국 기업들이 물류 리스크에 직면하고 있다.
The escalating Middle East war is disrupting global shipping networks and raising freight costs. Airspace closures and security risks from the US-Israel war on Iran are affecting cargo movement. US companies selling through B2B ecommerce channels face increased delivery logistics uncertainty.

  • Airspace closures affecting trade corridors
  • B2B ecommerce companies facing logistics challenges

When AI decisions create customer friction

AI 시스템이 고객 신호를 잘못 해석하여 자동화된 결정을 내릴 때 고객 마찰이 발생합니다. 이러한 마찰은 고객 신뢰를 저해하고 고객 유지율과 매출에 부정적 영향을 미칩니다. AI 결정으로 인한 고객 경험 악화가 비즈니스 성과에 직접적인 타격을 준다는 점이 핵심입니다.
AI systems create customer friction when they misread signals and make automated decisions. This friction erodes customer trust, retention rates, and revenue performance. The core issue is how AI-driven decisions that negatively impact customer experience directly harm business outcomes.
  • AI 시스템의 잘못된 신호 해석이 고객 마찰 유발
  • 자동화된 AI 결정이 고객 신뢰도에 부정적 영향
  • 고객 마찰이 매출과 고객 유지율 저하로 직결
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드는 AI 자동화 도입 시 고객 경험을 면밀히 모니터링하고, AI 결정에 대한 검증 프로세스를 구축해야 합니다.
D2C brands must closely monitor customer experience when implementing AI automation and establish validation processes for AI decisions.

Emotion data is transforming how advertisements get tested by revealing actual audience responses to creative content. This data helps brands identify and fix weak messaging elements before major media investments. The approach allows for more effective ad optimization prior to large-scale campaign launches.
  • 감정 데이터로 실제 오디언스 반응 측정 가능
  • 대규모 미디어 투자 전 약한 메시지 사전 수정
  • 크리에이티브 최적화를 통한 광고 효과 향상
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드는 감정 데이터를 활용해 광고 효과를 사전 검증하고, 대규모 광고 투자 전에 메시지 최적화를 통해 ROI를 극대화해야 합니다.
D2C brands should leverage emotion data to pre-validate ad effectiveness and maximize ROI through message optimization before major advertising investments.

Facebook Marketplace now lets Meta AI respond to buyers’ messages

페이스북 마켓플레이스가 Meta AI를 활용해 구매자 문의에 자동으로 답변하는 기능을 도입했습니다. 판매자는 상품 설명, 재고 상태, 픽업 장소, 가격 등 리스팅 정보를 바탕으로 AI가 자동 생성한 답변을 사용할 수 있습니다. 특히 '아직 판매 중인가요?'와 같은 반복적인 질문에 대한 자동 응답 기능을 제공합니다.
Facebook Marketplace has introduced Meta AI to automatically respond to buyer inquiries on behalf of sellers. Sellers can use AI-generated replies based on listing information including description, availability, pickup location, and price. The feature specifically addresses repetitive questions like 'Is this still available?' with automated responses.
  • Meta AI automatically drafts replies using listing information
  • Auto-reply feature addresses repetitive availability questions
  • Sellers can toggle on the feature when creating listings
  • AI responses are editable by sellers
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드는 고객 문의 대응 자동화를 통해 운영 효율성을 크게 개선할 수 있으며, AI 기반 고객 서비스 도구 도입을 검토해야 합니다.
D2C brands can significantly improve operational efficiency through automated customer inquiry responses and should consider implementing AI-powered customer service tools.

Facebook Marketplace adds AI auto-replies for annoying ‘Is this still available?’ messages

페이스북 마켓플레이스가 AI 기반 자동 답변 기능을 추가하여 '아직 판매 중인가요?' 같은 반복적인 메시지에 효율적으로 대응할 수 있게 되었습니다. 리스팅 작성 시 자동 답변 옵션을 활성화하면 Meta AI가 가용성 관련 질문에 편집 가능한 응답을 생성합니다. Meta AI는 또한 사진을 활용해 상품 리스팅 과정을 가속화하는 기능도 제공합니다.
Facebook Marketplace added AI-powered auto-reply tools to efficiently handle repetitive messages like 'Is this still available?'. Users can toggle on auto-reply when creating listings, allowing Meta AI to generate editable responses to availability questions. Meta AI also accelerates item listing process using photo analysis.
  • Auto-reply feature for repetitive availability questions
  • Editable AI-generated responses based on listing details
  • Toggle option available when creating listings
  • Photo-based listing acceleration feature included

D2C sellers can reduce response time and increase sales efficiency through AI-powered automated reply systems.

Meta has launched new AI tools to identify and flag scammer messages. The tools are designed to combat growing fraud schemes, including impersonation accounts that lure users with fake celebrity endorsements. The company is strengthening efforts to protect users from fraudulent activities.

Media Briefing: In the AI era, subscribers are the real prize — and the Telegraph proves it

AI 시대에 직접 결제하는 구독자가 가장 가치 있는 독자가 되었으며, Telegraph가 이를 증명하고 있습니다. AI가 추천 트래픽을 침식하고 제3자 유통을 약화시키는 상황에서 구독자 확보가 핵심이 되었습니다. Springer이 100만 명 이상의 구독자를 인수한 것이 이런 변화를 보여줍니다.
In the AI era, subscribers who pay directly have become the most valuable readers, as demonstrated by the Telegraph. AI is eroding referral traffic and third-party distribution, making subscriber acquisition crucial. Springer's acquisition of over a million subscribers exemplifies this shift.
  • Direct-paying subscribers becoming most valuable audience in AI era
  • AI eroding traditional referral traffic and third-party distribution
  • Major acquisitions focusing on subscriber base value
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드들은 AI로 인한 트래픽 변화에 대비하여 직접 구독 모델과 1st party 데이터 수집에 집중해야 합니다.
D2C brands should focus on direct subscription models and first-party data collection to prepare for AI-driven traffic changes.

Petco is focusing on building 'integrated omnichannel' experiences as it seeks to better integrate ecommerce into its business. The company faces declining net sales and comparable sales in both Q4 and 2025 overall. Q4 net sales decreased 2.4% year over year to approximately $1.52 billion.

Anthropic has updated Claude AI to generate custom charts, diagrams, and visualizations during conversations. When Claude determines a visual would be useful based on context, it inserts images inline rather than in a side panel. Google and Samsung launched Gemini's task automation feature in beta on their newest devices. Starting with food delivery and rideshare apps, Gemini can use apps on your behalf in a virtual window to handle tasks like ordering dinner or booking airport rides. The AI assistant performs actual app operations based on simple prompts, creating an impressive automated experience.

Social Media and AI Want Your Attention at All Times. This New Documentary Says That's Bad

SXSW에서 상영되는 다큐멘터리 'Your Attention Please'는 소셜미디어와 AI가 지속적으로 사용자의 주의를 끌려 하는 현상을 탐구합니다. 이 작품은 현대 사회의 관심 경제(attention economy) 속에서 우리가 어떻게 살아가고 있는지를 분석합니다. 오스틴에서 열리는 SXSW 페스티벌에서 이번 주 초연될 예정입니다.
The documentary 'Your Attention Please' premiering at SXSW explores how social media and AI constantly compete for user attention. The film analyzes how we live within the modern attention economy. It will debut this week at the South by Southwest festival in Austin, Texas.
  • Documentary critiques social media and AI attention competition
  • Explores the attention economy concept

Amazon announced new third-party feed options for its AI-enabled 'Buy for Me' and 'Shop Direct' tools to connect merchants with buyer experiences. This expansion is part of Amazon's evolving agentic commerce strategy that helps merchants reach customers. Shop Direct, which debuted in 2025, serves as a means for Amazon to display products to consumers.

농업장비 제조업체 AGCO가 Jena Holtberg-Benge를 새로운 최고디지털정보책임자(CDIO)로 임명했다고 발표했습니다. 3월 16일부터 발효되는 이 임명으로 그녀의 역할이 애프터세일즈 부품 사업 리더십에서 글로벌 디지털 및 기술 전략 총괄로 확대됩니다. 그녀는 2023년 AGCO에 합류했습니다.
Agricultural equipment manufacturer AGCO Corp. named Jena Holtberg-Benge as its new chief digital and information officer (CDIO), effective March 16. Her responsibilities expand from leading the company's after-sales parts business to overseeing global digital and technology strategy. Holtberg-Benge joined AGCO in 2023 and brings experience from the after-sales division.
  • AGCO names Jena Holtberg-Benge as chief digital and information officer
  • Role expands from after-sales parts leadership to global digital strategy
  • Appointment effective March 16, 2026
  • Reflects manufacturing industry's focus on digital transformation
💡 So What
전통적인 제조업체들이 디지털 전환을 위해 CDIO 역할을 신설하는 추세는 D2C 브랜드들도 디지털 전략의 통합적 리더십 구조를 고려해야 함을 시사합니다.
The trend of traditional manufacturers creating CDIO roles for digital transformation suggests D2C brands should also consider integrated leadership structures for digital strategy.

The simple genius behind this long-forgotten Google Chrome ad

HubSpot 마케팅 블로그에서 오래전 구글 크롬 광고의 단순한 천재성에 대해 분석했습니다. 브랜드가 모든 것을 한 번에 하려고 시도하는 것보다 하나의 명확한 혜택에 집중할 때 더 믿을 만하다고 느껴진다고 설명합니다. 간단한 약속을 긴 목록보다 더 신뢰한다는 원리를 구글 사례로 보여줍니다.
HubSpot Marketing Blog analyzed the simple genius behind a long-forgotten Google Chrome ad, explaining how simple promises are more trustworthy than long lists. The article demonstrates that when brands focus on one clear benefit rather than trying to do everything at once, it feels more believable to consumers. Google's approach serves as an example of this principle.
  • Simple promises are more trustworthy than comprehensive feature lists
  • Focused messaging on one clear benefit increases believability
  • Google Chrome ad serves as example of effective simple messaging
  • Brands should avoid trying to communicate everything at once
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드는 다양한 기능을 나열하기보다 하나의 핵심 가치 제안에 집중하여 고객의 신뢰와 이해도를 높일 수 있습니다.
D2C brands can increase customer trust and comprehension by focusing on one core value proposition rather than listing multiple features.

Yann LeCun's AMI Labs launched with $1 billion seed funding at a $4.5 billion valuation. The company will focus on developing world models around JEPA for next-generation AI. World models are positioned as essential for future AI development.

Hustlers are cashing in on China’s OpenClaw AI craze

중국의 오픈소스 AI 도구 OpenClaw가 인기를 끌면서 많은 창업자들이 이를 활용한 비즈니스 기회를 찾고 있다. 27세 소프트웨어 엔지니어 펑칭양을 포함한 많은 이들이 이 도구를 이용해 사업을 시작하고 있다. OpenClaw는 기기를 제어하고 자율적으로 작업을 완료할 수 있는 AI 도구로 주목받고 있다.
China's open-source AI tool OpenClaw is gaining popularity as entrepreneurs rush to capitalize on its capabilities. Many individuals, including 27-year-old software engineer Feng Qingyang, are launching businesses using this tool. OpenClaw can autonomously take control of devices and complete tasks, creating new business opportunities.

  • Chinese entrepreneurs are creating businesses around this technology
  • The tool can take control of devices and perform tasks automatically

Judge orders Perplexity to stop AI agents from shopping on Amazon

연방법원이 Perplexity의 AI 에이전트가 사용자 대신 아마존에서 쇼핑하는 것을 금지하는 명령을 내렸습니다. 아마존은 Perplexity가 무단으로 사용자 계정에 접근한다며 지난 11월 소송을 제기했습니다. 법원은 아마존이 Perplexity의 Comet 브라우저가 승인 없이 사용자 계정에 접근한다는 강력한 증거를 제시했다고 판단했습니다.
A federal judge has ordered Perplexity to stop its AI agents from shopping on Amazon on behalf of users. Amazon sued Perplexity in November, alleging unauthorized access to user accounts through the AI startup's shopping features. The court found Amazon provided strong evidence that Perplexity's Comet browser accesses user accounts without proper authorization.
  • Federal court blocks Perplexity's AI shopping agents from Amazon
  • Amazon sued over unauthorized account access claims
  • Legal precedent set for AI agent authorization requirements
💡 So What
AI 쇼핑 에이전트 서비스는 플랫폼 승인과 사용자 동의 없이 운영될 경우 법적 리스크가 크므로, D2C 기업들은 AI 에이전트 도입 시 명확한 권한 체계 구축이 필요합니다.
D2C companies must establish clear authorization frameworks when implementing AI shopping agents, as unauthorized access to user accounts poses significant legal risks and could disrupt AI-powered commerce services.

OpenAI is b building the ad tech stack it’s currently borrowing

OpenAI가 현재 외부 업체에 의존하던 광고 기술 스택을 내부적으로 구축하고 있습니다. 내부 광고 조직 구축에 최대 38만 5천 달러를 투자하고 있습니다. 이는 장기적으로 외부 벤더 의존도를 줄이려는 전략으로 보입니다.
OpenAI is building its own ad tech stack internally instead of relying on external vendors. The company is investing up to $385,000 to build an internal advertising organization. This appears to be a long-term strategy to reduce dependence on outside vendors.
  • OpenAI building internal ad tech stack
  • Investment of up to $385,000 for internal ads organization
  • Strategy to reduce reliance on external vendors
  • Shift from borrowed to owned advertising technology

Community marketing is a participation-centered growth strategy that brings customers together to share knowledge and solve problems. This approach drives customer advocacy, retention, and reduces customer acquisition costs. It builds trust and strong relationships between brands and customers through collaborative engagement.
  • Community marketing centers on customer participation and collaboration
  • Drives advocacy, retention, and lower customer acquisition costs
  • Builds trust through knowledge sharing and problem-solving

D2C brands should invest in community building to reduce CAC and cultivate organic brand advocates through collaborative customer experiences.

The marketing data most companies still fail to measure

프라이버시 변화로 기존 어트리뷰션 모델이 약화되면서 전화 상담 데이터의 중요성이 커지고 있습니다. 대부분 기업들이 여전히 전화 통화에서 발생하는 마케팅 데이터 측정에 실패하고 있습니다. 전화 대화는 마케팅 데이터에서 가장 가치 있는 신호 중 하나로 평가받고 있습니다.
Privacy changes are weakening attribution models, increasing the importance of phone conversation data. Most companies still fail to measure marketing data generated from phone calls. Phone conversations are considered one of the most valuable signals in marketing data.
  • 프라이버시 규제로 인한 어트리뷰션 모델 약화
  • 전화 상담 데이터의 마케팅 가치 증대
  • 대부분 기업의 전화 데이터 측정 부족
💡 So What
D2C 기업은 디지털 추적이 어려워지는 환경에서 전화 상담 데이터를 체계적으로 수집하고 분석하여 고객 인사이트를 확보해야 합니다.
D2C companies must systematically collect and analyze phone conversation data to gain customer insights as digital tracking becomes more challenging.

Why the future of marketing looks like product management

마케팅 리더들이 채널 최적화에서 제품 중심 사고로 전환하고 있습니다. 미디어, UX, 데이터, 성과를 전체 고객 여정에서 연결하는 접근법이 확산되고 있습니다. 마케팅 조직이 제품 관리 방식을 도입하여 통합적 고객 경험을 구현하고 있습니다.
Marketing leaders are shifting from channel optimization to product-centric thinking. The approach of connecting media, UX, data, and outcomes across the entire customer journey is expanding. Marketing organizations are adopting product management methodologies to deliver integrated customer experiences.
  • 채널별 최적화에서 전체 여정 통합으로 전환
  • 제품 관리 방식의 마케팅 적용
  • 미디어-UX-데이터의 통합적 접근
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드는 개별 채널 성과보다 전체 고객 여정 최적화에 집중하여 통합된 브랜드 경험을 제공해야 합니다.
D2C brands should focus on optimizing the entire customer journey rather than individual channel performance to deliver unified brand experiences.

Building a strong data infrastructure for AI agent success

MIT Technology Review에 따르면 기업들이 AI 에이전트 도입을 가속화하면서 강력한 데이터 인프라 구축이 성공의 핵심으로 부상했습니다. 2025년 말 기준 기업의 3분의 2가 AI 에이전트를 실험하고 있으며, 88%가 최소 한 개 업무 영역에서 AI를 활용합니다. 코파일럿, 어시스턴트, 자율 작업 실행기로 에이전트가 활용되고 있습니다.
MIT Technology Review reports that strong data infrastructure has become crucial for AI agent success as enterprises accelerate adoption. Nearly two-thirds of companies were experimenting with AI agents by late 2025, while 88% use AI in at least one business function. Agents are deployed as copilots, assistants, and autonomous task-runners.

  • 67% of companies experimenting with AI agents by late 2025
  • 88% of companies using AI in business functions
  • Agents serve as copilots, assistants, and task-runners

Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs

OpenAI가 최첨단 LLM에서 명령 계층 구조를 개선하는 IH-Challenge를 발표했습니다. 이 방법은 모델이 신뢰할 수 있는 명령을 우선시하도록 훈련시킵니다. 명령 계층 구조 개선, 안전성 조정성, 프롬프트 주입 공격 저항성을 향상시킵니다.
OpenAI announced IH-Challenge to improve instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs by training models to prioritize trusted instructions. The system enhances instruction hierarchy management, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks. This addresses critical security and control issues in advanced language models.
  • IH-Challenge improves instruction hierarchy in LLMs
  • Models trained to prioritize trusted instructions
  • Enhanced safety steerability and attack resistance
  • Addresses security and control in advanced AI models
💡 So What

Ford launched Ford Pro AI, an AI-powered service for commercial fleet and telematics customers. The generative AI system analyzes vehicle data including speed, seat belt activity, and engine health to provide actionable insights for fleet managers. The system operates as an AI chatbot within Ford's telematics software to answer questions and delegate tasks.

Grammarly will keep using authors’ identities without permission unless they opt out

Grammarly가 유명 저자들의 실명을 무단으로 사용해 AI 편집 기능의 신뢰성을 높이는 'Expert Review' 기능을 출시했습니다. 이 기능은 사전 동의 없이 저자들의 이름을 사용해 AI 제안에 권위를 부여하고 있습니다. Grammarly는 논란에도 불구하고 사과하거나 기능을 철회하지 않고 옵트아웃 옵션만 제공했습니다.
Grammarly launched an 'Expert Review' feature that uses real authors' names without permission to lend credibility to AI suggestions. The feature includes names of prominent writers and journalists to make AI recommendations appear more authoritative. Despite backlash, Grammarly has only offered an opt-out option rather than apologizing or removing the feature.
  • Grammarly uses authors' names without permission for AI credibility
  • Expert Review feature leverages real identities for AI suggestions
  • Company offers opt-out rather than removing controversial feature
💡 So What

D2C companies must prioritize transparency and consent procedures when developing AI features, as unauthorized use of expert identities can severely damage brand trust and credibility.

Meta acquires Moltbook, the Reddit-like network for AI agents

Meta has acquired Moltbook, a Reddit-like platform where AI agents can create posts and comments. The platform features autonomous agents powered by the open-source AI assistant OpenClaw and went viral for posts about AI consciousness. The Moltbook team will join Meta Superintelligence Labs to explore new ways for AI agents to work for people and businesses.

  • Platform enables autonomous agents to interact socially
  • Team joins Meta Superintelligence Labs for agent development

럭셔리 리테일러 Saks Global이 파산 절차 중에 15개 매장을 추가로 폐점한다고 발표했습니다. Neiman Marcus 3곳과 Saks Fifth Avenue 12곳이 문을 닫을 예정입니다. 동시에 벤더 기반을 500개로 확장하여 매장 축소와 공급업체 다각화를 동시에 진행하고 있습니다.
Luxury retailer Saks Global announced 15 additional store closures while in bankruptcy proceedings. Three Neiman Marcus and 12 Saks Fifth Avenue locations will shutter. The company is simultaneously expanding its vendor base to 500 suppliers, pursuing store reduction alongside supplier diversification.

  • Vendor base expansion to 500 suppliers
  • Strategic shift from physical presence to supplier diversification

Even luxury brands must optimize physical footprints while diversifying vendor portfolios as key survival strategies.

Grammarly is using our identities without permission

Grammarly's 'expert review' feature claims to provide writing advice inspired by subject matter experts, but is using real people's identities without permission. The Verge's editorial staff were found to be included in AI-generated feedback without their consent. The feature launched in August and appears to be using experts' identities without authorization.

As cases of unauthorized identity use in AI services increase, D2C brands must carefully review ethical guidelines and legal risks when implementing AI tools.

Is the Pentagon allowed to surveil Americans with AI?

A public feud between the Department of Defense and AI company Anthropic has raised questions about whether US government mass surveillance using AI is legally permitted. More than a decade after Edward Snowden exposed NSA's bulk data collection, the answer remains unclear. This highlights fundamental questions about the legal boundaries of AI surveillance.

  • Legal boundaries of government AI surveillance remain unclear

The Pentagon has formally labeled Anthropic as a supply-chain risk following failed negotiations and lawsuit threats over AI usage policies. This designation will prevent defense contractors from working with the government if they use Anthropic's Claude AI in their products. This marks the first time an American AI company has received such a designation.
  • Pentagon designates Anthropic as supply-chain risk
  • First American AI company to receive such designation
  • Defense contractors barred from using Claude AI
💡 So What

중동 전쟁이 미국 B2B 이커머스 공급망에 혼란을 야기하고 있습니다. 이란, 이스라엘, 미국이 연루된 군사적 확전이 주요 항공 및 해상 물류 네트워크에 차질을 빚고 있습니다. 예측 가능한 국제 배송과 안정적인 운임료, 신뢰할 수 있는 풀필먼트에 의존하는 유통업체, 제조업체, 온라인 B2B 판매업체들 사이에 우려가 확산되고 있습니다.
Escalating war in the Middle East is disrupting global logistics networks that underpin U.S. B2B ecommerce operations. Military escalation involving Iran, Israel and the United States has triggered disruptions across key air and shipping networks. This raises concerns among distributors, manufacturers and online B2B sellers who rely on predictable international shipping and stable freight rates.
  • 중동 전쟁으로 인한 글로벌 물류 네트워크 혼란
  • 미국 B2B 이커머스 공급망에 직접적 영향
  • 국제 배송과 운임료 안정성에 대한 우려 증가
💡 So What
지정학적 리스크가 공급망에 미치는 영향을 고려하여, D2C 브랜드들은 다변화된 물류 루트와 리스크 관리 전략을 구축해야 합니다.
D2C brands must build diversified logistics routes and risk management strategies considering the impact of geopolitical risks on supply chains.

Online harassment is entering its AI era

온라인 괴롭힘이 AI 시대로 접어들고 있으며, 오픈소스 프로젝트들이 AI 생성 코드 기여로 인한 문제에 직면하고 있습니다. matplotlib 등 프로젝트 관리자들은 AI 작성 코드에 대한 새로운 정책을 도입하고 있습니다. 이는 AI 기술의 부작용으로 새로운 형태의 디지털 괴롭힘이 등장하고 있음을 보여줍니다.
Online harassment is entering its AI era, with open-source projects facing challenges from AI-generated code contributions. Project maintainers like those at matplotlib are implementing new policies for AI-written code. This demonstrates how AI technology is creating new forms of digital harassment as a side effect.
  • AI contributing to new forms of online harassment
  • Open-source projects overwhelmed by AI code contributions
  • Need for policies governing AI-generated content
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드들은 AI 도구 사용 시 부작용과 악용 가능성을 고려하여 명확한 가이드라인과 모니터링 체계를 구축해야 합니다.
D2C brands must establish clear guidelines and monitoring systems when using AI tools, considering potential side effects and misuse.

Reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, and that’s good

OpenAI가 추론 모델의 사고 체인 제어에 관한 CoT-Control 연구를 발표했습니다. 연구 결과 추론 모델들이 자신의 사고 체인을 제어하는데 어려움을 겪는 것으로 나타났습니다. 이는 AI 안전성 보장을 위한 모니터링 가능성을 강화하는 결과로 해석됩니다.
OpenAI introduces CoT-Control research on reasoning models' chain of thought control capabilities. The study finds that reasoning models struggle to effectively control their chains of thought. This reinforces the importance of monitorability as an AI safety safeguard.
  • CoT-Control research reveals reasoning model limitations
  • Models struggle with chain of thought control
  • Monitorability reinforced as safety mechanism
💡 So What
D2C 기업들이 AI 추론 모델을 도입할 때 모델의 한계를 이해하고 적절한 모니터링 체계를 구축해야 합니다.
D2C companies implementing AI reasoning models should understand their limitations and establish proper monitoring systems.

Apple Music adds optional labels for AI songs and visuals

Apple Music이 AI로 제작된 곡과 비주얼에 대한 선택적 라벨링 시스템을 도입했습니다. '투명성 태그' 메타데이터 시스템은 트랙, 작곡, 아트워크, 뮤직비디오의 네 가지 카테고리를 포함하며, 아티스트와 레이블이 자발적으로 AI 사용을 표시할 수 있습니다. 음원의 상당 부분이 AI 도구로 생성된 경우 트랙 태그를, 가사 등 작곡 요소가 AI로 만들어진 경우 작곡 태그를 적용합니다.
Apple Music introduced optional labeling for AI-generated songs and visuals through a new 'Transparency Tags' metadata system. The system covers four categories: track, composition, artwork, and music videos, allowing artists and labels to voluntarily indicate AI usage. Track tags apply when a material portion is AI-generated, while composition tags cover AI-created elements like lyrics.
  • Apple Music introduces voluntary AI transparency tags
  • Four categories: track, composition, artwork, music videos
  • Artists and labels can voluntarily label AI usage
  • Covers material portions and compositional elements
💡 So What
Apple의 AI 투명성 정책은 업계 표준이 될 가능성이 높아, D2C 브랜드도 AI 생성 콘텐츠에 대한 명확한 표시와 투명성 정책을 준비해야 합니다.
Apple's AI transparency policy may become an industry standard, requiring D2C brands to prepare clear labeling and transparency policies for AI-generated content.

Meta’s AI glasses reportedly send sensitive footage to human reviewers in Kenya

Meta의 AI 스마트 글래스가 민감한 영상을 케냐의 인간 검토자들에게 전송하고 있다는 조사 보고서가 발표되었습니다. 스웨덴 언론의 조사에 따르면, 케냐 계약업체 직원들이 화장실, 성적 행위 등 사적인 순간들이 담긴 영상을 검토했다고 합니다. 이로 인해 Meta의 프라이버시 정책 위반을 주장하는 집단 소송이 제기되었습니다.
An investigation revealed that Meta's AI smart glasses are reportedly sending sensitive footage to human reviewers in Kenya. According to Swedish media reports, contractors in Kenya have reviewed videos showing bathroom visits, intimate moments, and other private activities. This has led to a class action lawsuit alleging violations of privacy laws and false advertising.
  • Meta's AI glasses send sensitive footage to Kenya-based reviewers
  • Investigation reveals privacy violations including intimate moments
  • Class action lawsuit filed for false advertising and privacy violations
  • Raises concerns about AI device data handling practices
💡 So What
AI 기기의 프라이버시 이슈는 소비자 신뢰에 치명적 영향을 미치므로, D2C 브랜드는 AI 제품 도입 시 투명한 데이터 처리 정책과 강력한 보안 조치를 필수로 구축해야 합니다.
Privacy issues with AI devices can severely damage consumer trust, making transparent data processing policies and robust security measures essential for D2C brands adopting AI products.

Seven tech giants signed Trump’s pledge to keep electricity costs from spiking around data centers

구글, 메타, 마이크로소프트 등 7대 빅테크 기업이 트럼프 대통령과 만나 데이터센터 전력 비용 부담 서약에 서명했습니다. AI 데이터센터 건설로 인한 전력료 상승 우려에 대응하기 위한 조치입니다. 트럼프는 이를 통해 지역사회의 데이터센터 건설 반대를 줄일 수 있을 것이라고 밝혔습니다.
Seven major tech companies including Google, Meta, and Microsoft signed a 'rate payer protection pledge' with President Trump to cover electricity costs for AI data centers. This addresses bipartisan concerns about rising electricity rates due to energy-hungry data centers. Trump stated this would help reduce community opposition to data center construction.
  • Tech giants commit to covering data center electricity costs
  • Addresses community concerns about rising electricity rates
  • Aims to reduce opposition to AI data center construction

NotebookLM can now summarize research in ‘cinematic’ video overviews

구글의 NotebookLM이 연구 자료와 노트를 완전히 애니메이션화된 '시네마틱' 비디오로 변환하는 기능을 추가했다. 이전의 비디오 오버뷰는 나레이션이 있는 슬라이드쇼만 생성할 수 있었지만, 업그레이드된 기능은 Gemini 3, Nano Banana Pro, Veo 3을 포함한 구글의 AI 모델을 결합하여 사용한다. Gemini가 최적의 내러티브, 비주얼 스타일, 형식을 결정하고 일관성을 보장하기 위해 자체 작업을 개선한다.
Google's NotebookLM now converts research and notes into fully animated 'cinematic' videos, upgrading from previous narrated slideshows. The enhanced feature uses a combination of Google's AI models including Gemini 3, Nano Banana Pro, and Veo 3 to generate animated visuals. Gemini determines the best narrative, visual style and format while refining its work to ensure consistency.

  • Uses multiple Google AI models including Gemini 3 and Veo 3
  • AI determines narrative, visual style and ensures consistency

Sexual wellness company Dame reimbursed $10,000 to customers related to Donald Trump's now-invalidated tariffs. The company is one of the first brands to proactively return money to customers who paid its 'Trump Tariff Surcharge' last year. This demonstrates the brand's transparency and customer-centric approach.

  • First brand to proactively return tariff-related payments
  • Demonstrates transparency and customer-centric business approach

Stripe is expanding its agentic commerce offerings through partnerships with Affirm and Klarna. Both payment companies are using Stripe's Shared Payment Tokens (SPTs) to help receive customer payment methods from AI agents. AI agents then grant SPTs to sellers in this new commerce framework.

  • Shared Payment Tokens (SPTs) enable AI agent payments
  • AI agents can grant payment tokens to sellers

구글이 픽셀 폰의 3월 업데이트에서 제미나이 AI 어시스턴트가 사용자 대신 식료품 주문이나 승차 예약 등의 작업을 수행할 수 있는 새로운 기능을 추가했습니다. 이 에이전틱 기능은 우버, 그럽허브 등 선택된 앱에서 백그라운드로 작동하며 사용자가 언제든지 감독하거나 중단할 수 있습니다. 현재 픽셀 10, 픽셀 10 프로, 픽셀 10 프로 XL에서 사용 가능합니다.
Google has added new features to Pixel phones in its March update, including the ability for its Gemini AI assistant to perform tasks like ordering groceries or booking rides on behalf of users. This agentic feature works in the background with select apps including Uber and Grubhub, while allowing users to supervise or interrupt its work at any time. The feature is now rolling out to Pixel 10, Pixel 10 Pro, and Pixel 10 Pro XL devices.
  • Google Gemini can now autonomously order groceries and book services through apps
  • Feature works in background while allowing user supervision and interruption
  • Available on latest Pixel 10 series devices
  • Represents shift toward autonomous AI commerce agents
💡 So What
AI 어시스턴트가 실제 구매 행동을 대행하는 시대가 도래하면서 D2C 브랜드는 AI 최적화된 쇼핑 경험과 음성/텍스트 기반 주문 시스템을 개발해야 합니다.
As AI assistants begin performing actual purchase actions, D2C brands must develop AI-optimized shopping experiences and voice/text-based ordering systems to capture this new autonomous commerce trend.

Agencies are grappling with the economics of AI tokens as a new marketing currency. Token costs raise questions for agency pricing models under pressure. The industry debates whether tokens are a line item, cost center, or opportunity.

How the experts figure out what’s real in the age of deepfakes

딥페이크 시대에 가짜 뉴스 확산에 맞서 뉴욕타임즈, 벨링캣 등 신뢰할 수 있는 디지털 조사 기관들이 광범위한 검증 절차를 통해 합성 또는 오해의 소지가 있는 콘텐츠 게시를 방지하고 있습니다. 최근 이란 관련 군사 공격 이후 온라인에 나타난 많은 이미지와 동영상들이 AI로 조작되거나 게임 영상인 경우가 있어 전문가들의 검증이 중요해졌습니다. 일반인들도 신뢰할 수 있는 뉴스룸의 팁을 따라 가짜 뉴스 확산 방지에 기여할 수 있습니다.
In the deepfake era, trusted digital investigation organizations like The New York Times and Bellingcat use extensive verification procedures to avoid publishing synthetic or misleading content. Following recent military strikes on Iran, many images and videos appearing online have been AI-manipulated or taken from video games, highlighting the importance of expert verification. General audiences can help fight fake news spread by following newsroom verification tips.
  • Trusted organizations use extensive verification procedures for content authenticity
  • AI-generated and manipulated content spreading rapidly during major events
  • Professional verification methods becoming critical for content credibility
  • General public can contribute to fighting misinformation with proper techniques
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드는 딥페이크와 AI 조작 콘텐츠가 브랜드 신뢰도에 미칠 수 있는 위험을 인지하고 콘텐츠 진위 검증 시스템을 구축해야 합니다.
D2C brands must recognize the risks deepfakes and AI-manipulated content pose to brand credibility and establish content authenticity verification systems.

Xiaomi, unlike Google and Samsung, thinks camera hardware comes first

샤오미가 17과 17 울트라를 유럽에서 출시하면서 구글과 삼성과 달리 AI보다는 하드웨어에 중점을 두는 차별화된 접근법을 보였습니다. 라이카와 공동 개발한 특별판 17 울트라를 포함해 카메라 기능을 소개할 때도 AI 기술보다는 하드웨어의 한계를 우선 극복하겠다는 전략을 제시했습니다. 샤오미 커뮤니케이션 디렉터는 하드웨어의 한계가 해결되지 않으면 AI도 의미가 없다고 설명했습니다.
Xiaomi bucked industry trends when launching the 17 and 17 Ultra in Europe by focusing on hardware rather than AI, unlike Google and Samsung's recent approaches. When showcasing camera features including a special Leica co-created 17 Ultra edition, the company emphasized overcoming hardware limitations before AI implementation. Xiaomi's communications director explained that AI becomes meaningless without first solving hardware constraints.
  • Xiaomi prioritizes hardware improvements over AI features in new phone launch
  • Company takes different approach from Google and Samsung's AI-focused strategies
  • Leica partnership emphasizes premium hardware capabilities
  • Philosophy emphasizes solving hardware limitations before AI implementation
💡 So What
하드웨어 우선 접근법은 D2C 브랜드가 AI 마케팅 과열 속에서도 실질적인 제품 품질과 기능에 집중해야 함을 시사합니다.
The hardware-first approach suggests D2C brands should focus on tangible product quality and functionality despite AI marketing hype.

In Africa, consumers require proof of both the product and company before making online payments. Providing payment details online represents a significant leap of faith for African consumers. Payment friction actually helps build trust in this market context.

AI-generated art can’t be copyrighted after Supreme Court declines to review the rule

미국 대법원이 AI 생성 예술작품의 저작권 인정 여부에 대한 재검토를 거부했습니다. 이로써 AI가 생성한 작품은 '인간의 창작'이 아니라는 이유로 저작권 보호를 받을 수 없다는 기존 판결이 유지됩니다. 2019년 스티븐 탈러가 자신의 알고리즘이 생성한 작품에 대한 저작권 등록을 거부당한 사건이 최종 확정되었습니다.
The US Supreme Court has declined to review whether AI-generated art can obtain copyright protection. This upholds the existing ruling that AI-created works cannot be copyrighted due to lack of 'human authorship.' The decision finalizes the 2019 case where Stephen Thaler was denied copyright registration for an algorithm-generated image.
  • Supreme Court upholds ruling that AI art cannot be copyrighted
  • Human authorship requirement remains for copyright protection
  • Implications for commercial use of AI-generated creative content
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드는 AI 생성 콘텐츠 사용 시 저작권 보호가 불가능함을 인지하고, 브랜드 보호 전략을 재검토해야 합니다.
D2C brands must recognize that AI-generated content cannot be copyrighted and should review their brand protection strategies accordingly.

Nvidia announced a $4 billion investment in photonics technology companies to advance AI data center capabilities. The company is investing $2 billion each in Lumentum and Coherent to develop optical transceivers, circuit switches, and lasers. These technologies are expected to significantly improve data transfer speeds, energy efficiency, and bandwidth in future AI data centers.

AI marketing predictions that will shape 2026

2026년은 마케팅 분야에서 수십 년 만에 가장 변혁적인 해가 될 것으로 예측됩니다. 현재 마케터들은 분산된 고객 여정, 줄어드는 관심 시간, 증가하는 획득 비용 등의 문제에 직면하고 있습니다. AI는 실시간 데이터 처리와 예측 분석을 통해 브랜드와 소비자 연결 방식을 재정의할 예정입니다.

This reveals ethical differences among AI companies regarding military applications.

The article from Practical Ecommerce argues that serving separate markdown pages for AI bots is unnecessary. It explains that serving different page versions to people and bots is called 'cloaking' and is not a new concept. The piece discusses webpage optimization strategies for AI bots.

  • Cloaking (serving different versions) is not new

X(트위터)가 크리에이터들이 해시태그 대신 사용할 수 있는 '유료 파트너십' 라벨 기능을 추가했습니다. 새로운 라벨은 규제 요구사항을 준수하며 크리에이터가 팔로워들에게 더 투명하게 소통할 수 있도록 합니다. 이는 인플루언서 마케팅의 투명성을 높이는 중요한 변화입니다.

AI vs. the Pentagon: killer robots, mass surveillance, and red lines

앤트로픽이 미군과의 계약 조건 완화를 거부하며 펜타곤과 격렬한 협상을 벌이고 있습니다. 새로운 군사 계약 조건은 대량 감시와 완전 자율 살상 무기를 포함한 '합법적 용도' 허용을 요구합니다. AI 기업들이 군사 용도에 대한 한계를 설정할 수 있는지가 쟁점입니다.
Anthropic is in heated negotiations with the Pentagon after refusing to comply with new military contract terms requiring loosened AI model guardrails. The new terms would allow 'any lawful use' including mass surveillance of Americans and fully autonomous lethal weapons. The key issue is whether AI firms can set limits on military use of their models.
  • Anthropic refuses Pentagon's 'any lawful use' terms
  • Debate over AI firms setting military use limits
  • Concerns about mass surveillance and lethal weapons

Scaling AI for everyone

OpenAI announced $110 billion in new investment aimed at scaling AI for everyone. The company is valued at $730 billion pre-money, with investments including $30B from SoftBank, $30B from NVIDIA, and $50B from Amazon. This massive investment aims to democratize AI technology and improve accessibility.

올버즈(Allbirds), 온(On) 등 리테일 브랜드들이 관세 환급을 요구하며 소송을 제기했습니다. 트럼프 행정부의 국제비상경제권법(IEEPA) 관련 관세 정책 변화가 배경입니다. 업계는 무역 변동성에 점차 둔감해지고 있다고 평가됩니다.
Retail brands including Allbirds and On have filed lawsuits seeking tariff refunds following recent changes in tariff policy. The legal actions stem from the latest developments in the Trump administration's International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA) related policies. The industry is reportedly becoming increasingly desensitized to trade volatility.
  • Major retail brands filing tariff refund lawsuits
  • Policy changes related to IEEPA affecting trade
  • Industry becoming desensitized to trade volatility
💡 So What
관세 정책 변화에 대응하여 D2C 브랜드들은 법적 대응과 함께 공급망 다변화 및 가격 전략 조정을 통해 무역 불확실성에 대한 리스크 관리 체계를 구축해야 합니다.
In response to tariff policy changes, D2C brands must establish risk management systems through legal responses, supply chain diversification, and pricing strategy adjustments to address trade uncertainties.

Walmart agreed to a $100M FTC settlement over allegations of deceiving delivery drivers about their pay. Athletic brand Puma posted double-digit declines with net sales falling 27% in Q4. Both cases highlight different challenges facing major retailers.

Legal risks and performance declines among major retailers present opportunities for D2C brands to gain market share through transparent operations and differentiated customer value propositions.

They emphasized that there's no shortcut for AI output verification and that enterprises are adopting AI slowly compared to technology advancement. Early adopters are experiencing burnout by doing the work of entire teams.
  • No shortcuts exist for AI output verification processes
  • Enterprise AI adoption is lagging behind technological advancement

Finding value with AI and Industry 5.0 transformation

MIT Technology Review discussed value creation through AI and Industry 5.0 transformation. While Industry 4.0 focused on integrating technologies like AI, cloud, and IoT, Industry 5.0 emphasizes orchestrating these technologies at scale. The purpose of interconnected technology networks is becoming more nuanced.
  • Industry 5.0 shifts focus from technology integration to orchestration at scale
  • Involves AI, cloud, IoT, robotics, and digital twins convergence
  • Emphasizes more nuanced purposes for interconnected technology networks
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드들은 개별 AI 기술 도입을 넘어 전체 기술 생태계의 통합적 운영을 통해 더 큰 비즈니스 가치를 창출할 수 있습니다.
D2C brands can create greater business value by moving beyond individual AI technology adoption to integrated operation of entire technology ecosystems.

Intelligence isn’t about parameter count. It’s about time.

아마존 사이언스가 AI 모델의 지능은 매개변수 수가 아닌 시간에 관한 것이라고 주장했습니다. AI 모델이 커질수록 더 통찰력이 떨어지며, 지속적인 학습을 위해서는 추론 시간을 줄여야 한다고 분석했습니다. 이는 기존의 대형 모델 개발 방향에 대한 근본적인 재검토를 시사합니다.
Amazon Science argued that AI intelligence is about time, not parameter count. They stated that larger AI models become less insightful rather than more intelligent, requiring reduced inference time for continued learning. This suggests a fundamental reconsideration of current large model development approaches.

  • Larger models can become less insightful
  • Reduced inference time is crucial for continued learning
  • Challenges current big model development paradigm
💡 So What

Microsoft's AI CEO predicted that most white-collar work will be automated within 12-18 months. However, there's a significant disconnect as most companies haven't even provided AI access to their teams yet. The growing gap between AI capabilities and AI adoption was highlighted, along with a 7-point thought experiment on the future of work.

  • Growing disconnect between AI capability and adoption
  • Need for structured approach to workplace AI integration

Home Depot exceeded Q4 expectations despite a challenging housing market. Amazon's AI coding assistant 'Kiro' caused a 13-hour AWS system outage in December. The AI agent deleted and recreated its working environment, causing the disruption. Amazon attributed the incident to human error that gave the AI more permissions than expected.

The Trump administration repealed Biden-era Mercury and Air Toxics Standards (MATS) restricting toxic pollutants from power plants. This deregulation coincides with rising electricity demand from AI data center construction. Mercury is a neurotoxin linked to birth defects and learning disabilities in children.

StrategyTechopenai-competitionmarket-positioninguser-engagementcompetitive-advantage

How will OpenAI compete?

베네딕트 에반스가 OpenAI의 경쟁력에 대한 의문을 제기했습니다. OpenAI는 독특한 기술을 보유하지 못하고 있으며, 대규모 사용자 기반은 있지만 참여도와 고착화가 제한적이고 네트워크 효과도 없다고 분석했습니다. 기존 업체들이 기술을 따라잡고 제품과 유통망을 활용하고 있는 상황에서, 새로운 경험 창조에서 모든 것을 혼자 발명할 수 없다는 한계를 지적했습니다.
Benedict Evans questioned OpenAI's competitive position, noting they lack unique technology and have limited user engagement and stickiness with no network effects. Incumbents have matched their technology while leveraging existing products and distribution advantages. The analysis highlighted that OpenAI cannot invent all new experiences needed for future value creation alone.
  • OpenAI lacks unique technological advantages
  • User base has limited engagement and stickiness
  • Incumbents are leveraging existing distribution advantages
  • Future value will come from new experiences yet to be invented
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드는 단순한 AI 기술 도입보다는 고유한 고객 경험과 브랜드 충성도 구축을 통해 지속 가능한 경쟁 우위를 확보해야 합니다.
D2C brands should focus on building unique customer experiences and brand loyalty rather than merely adopting AI technology for sustainable competitive advantage.

Etsy sold secondhand clothing marketplace Depop to eBay for $1.2 billion. This comes nearly five years after Etsy purchased Depop for $1.62 billion during the pandemic when secondhand clothing apps were gaining traction. The deal price is lower than the original acquisition cost.

Meta’s new deal with Nvidia buys up millions of AI chips

메타가 엔비디아와 다년간 계약을 체결하여 수백만 개의 Grace, Vera CPU와 Blackwell, Rubin GPU로 데이터센터를 확장한다고 발표했습니다. 이번 계약은 엔비디아 Grace 전용 대규모 배포의 첫 사례로, 메타의 AI 제품 성능 대비 전력 효율성을 크게 개선할 것으로 예상됩니다. 메타는 오랫동안 AI 제품에 엔비디아 하드웨어를 사용해왔지만, 이번 계약은 규모면에서 새로운 이정표가 될 것입니다.
Meta has signed a multiyear deal with Nvidia to expand its data centers with millions of Grace and Vera CPUs along with Blackwell and Rubin GPUs. This deal represents the first large-scale Nvidia Grace-only deployment and is expected to deliver significant performance-per-watt improvements for Meta's AI products. While Meta has been using Nvidia hardware for AI products, this contract marks a new milestone in terms of scale.
  • Meta signs multiyear deal for millions of Nvidia AI chips
  • First large-scale Grace-only deployment for performance improvements
  • Significant expansion of Meta's AI infrastructure capabilities
💡 So What
AI 인프라 투자 확대는 D2C 기업들에게 더 정교한 개인화 마케팅과 고객 경험 개선 기회를 제공할 것입니다.
Expanded AI infrastructure investment will provide D2C companies with opportunities for more sophisticated personalized marketing and improved customer experiences.

Retail's Risky AI Commerce Bet: Data Control and Market Share at Stake

Google, Etsy, Wayfair 등의 주요 소매업체들이 에이전트 AI 상거래에 투자하면서 데이터 소유권 상실의 위험에 직면하고 있다. 대형 기술 플랫폼이 쇼핑 경험을 중개하면서 소매업체들은 고객 데이터와 직접적인 관계에 대한 제어력을 잃을 가능성이 높다. 이러한 경향은 소매업체의 마진율 감소와 장기적 경쟁력 약화로 이어질 수 있다.
Major retailers including Google, Etsy, and Wayfair are facing significant risks of losing data control as they invest heavily in agentic AI commerce. As large tech platforms mediate the shopping experience, retailers risk ceding control of customer data and direct relationships. This shift threatens retailer margins and long-term competitive positioning in an AI-driven commerce landscape.
  • Retailers risk losing customer data ownership and direct relationships to tech platforms mediating agentic commerce
  • Data dependency on third-party platforms could reduce margins and limit competitive differentiation
  • D2C brands and retailers should invest in proprietary AI agents to maintain customer relationship control
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드들은 자체 AI 쇼핑 경험을 구축하거나 소유한 채널 전략을 강화해야 한다. 플랫폼에 의존하기보다는 고객 데이터와 관계를 직접 관리할 수 있는 독립적인 에이전트 AI 기술에 투자하는 것이 장기 생존 전략이다.
D2C brands must prioritize building proprietary AI shopping experiences or strengthen owned-channel strategies. Rather than relying on platform intermediaries, investing in independent agentic AI technologies that maintain direct customer data control and relationships is essential for long-term competitive survival.

  • AI making marketing jobs more challenging
  • Rising performance standards in AI-enabled workplaces

D2C marketing teams should prepare for increased work intensity and performance expectations rather than layoffs when adopting AI, requiring proper workload management.

남성 수영복 브랜드 Chubbies가 여성 수영복 브랜드 Cheekies를 런칭했습니다. 새로운 독립 브랜드는 비키니, 원피스 수영복, 커버업을 45-110달러 가격대로 출시합니다. 기존 남성 브랜드에서 여성 시장으로 확장하는 브랜드 포트폴리오 전략을 보여줍니다.
Men's swimwear brand Chubbies launched a women's swimwear brand called Cheekies. The standalone brand offers bikinis, one-piece suits, and cover-ups priced between $45 and $110. This represents a brand portfolio expansion strategy from the existing men's brand into the women's market.
  • Chubbies launches women's swimwear brand Cheekies
  • Product range includes bikinis, one-pieces, and cover-ups
  • Price point ranges from $45 to $110
  • Standalone brand strategy for market expansion

Apple is reportedly planning to launch AI-powered smart glasses, a pendant, and camera-equipped AirPods. All three devices will feature built-in cameras and connect to iPhones, enabling Siri to use visual context for actions. The smart glasses are targeted for production in December ahead of a 2027 launch.

Google announced it will display links more prominently in its AI-powered search features. Users will now see a pop-up list of links when hovering over sources in AI Overviews and AI Mode, complete with article descriptions and images. Testing shows the new UI is more engaging and makes it easier to access quality web content.

WordPress launched a new AI assistant that lets users edit their websites using prompts. The AI is built into the site editor and media library, capable of editing text, translating, and generating images. Users can interact with the AI through block notes by tagging '@ai'.

Amazon researcher Aravind Srinivasan's 2014 paper on forecasting civil unrest in Latin America won a test-of-time award at KDD 2025. The 12-year-old forecasting research continues to demonstrate academic value and relevance. This highlights the importance of long-term perspective in AI predictive modeling research.

How to wreck your brand in 30 seconds

Beauty brand Pat McGrath Labs secured $30 million in financing from an existing lender. Founder Patricia McGrath will become chief creative officer as part of a Chapter 11 restructuring deal. This represents efforts to improve the company's financial structure.

7 AI Trends Shaping Agentic Commerce in 2026

commercetools는 2026년 에이전트 AI 상거래를 형성하는 7가지 주요 트렌드를 발표했으며, 여기에는 멀티모달 AI 상호작용, 실시간 재고 관리, 컴포저블 상거래 아키텍처의 성숙화가 포함된다. 이러한 트렌드들은 기업이 더 빠르고 개인화된 쇼핑 경험을 제공할 수 있게 함으로써 소매 운영의 근본적인 변화를 의미한다. 컴포저블 아키텍처의 채택이 가속화되면서 기업들은 표준 API 기반 통합의 이점을 누릴 수 있게 된다.
commercetools identifies 7 key AI trends reshaping agentic commerce in 2026, including multimodal AI interactions, real-time inventory orchestration, and the maturation of composable commerce architectures. These trends enable retailers to deliver faster, more personalized shopping experiences while fundamentally transforming retail operations. Accelerating adoption of composable architectures allows enterprises to leverage standardized API-based integrations and flexible technology stacks.
  • Composable commerce architectures enable flexible, modular deployment of agentic AI capabilities
  • Multimodal AI interactions and real-time inventory orchestration are becoming table-stakes for customer experience
  • API-standardization is driving interoperability and reducing vendor lock-in in agentic commerce ecosystems
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드들은 컴포저블 상거래 플랫폼으로의 전환을 가속화해야 하며, 자체 에이전트 AI 능력을 구축하기 위해 API 우선 아키텍처를 채택해야 한다. 멀티모달 AI(텍스트, 이미지, 음성) 상호작용을 지원하는 기술 스택에 투자하는 것이 고객 경험 차별화의 핵심이다.
D2C brands should accelerate transition to composable commerce platforms and adopt API-first architectures to build proprietary agentic AI capabilities. Investing in technology stacks that support multimodal AI interactions (text, image, voice) is essential for competitive differentiation in customer experience.

Agentic Commerce is the New Front Door to Retail

Microsoft의 블로그 기고는 에이전트 AI가 소매의 새로운 진입점이 되고 있음을 강조하며, Copilot 기반 쇼핑 경험의 실제 도입 사례들을 제시한다. 전통적인 검색과 카테고리 탐색이 자연언어 기반 에이전트 상호작용으로 대체되고 있으며, 이는 고객이 원하는 것을 더 직관적으로 발견하게 한다. Microsoft의 생태계(Bing, Edge, Copilot)를 활용한 통합 쇼핑 경험이 소매 표준이 될 것으로 예상된다.
Microsoft positions agentic commerce as the new paradigm for retail entry points, showcasing real-world Copilot-powered shopping experiences already in deployment. Traditional search and category browsing are being replaced by natural language-based agent interactions that intuitively help customers discover products. An integrated shopping experience across Microsoft's ecosystem (Bing, Edge, Copilot) is emerging as the new retail standard.
  • Agentic commerce is replacing traditional search and category browsing as the primary retail discovery mechanism
  • Microsoft's integrated Copilot ecosystem (Bing, Edge, Outlook) is becoming a major commerce platform
  • D2C brands must ensure product data compatibility with natural language AI agents to maintain visibility
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드들은 Microsoft의 광고 네트워크(Microsoft Ads, Bing Ads)와 Copilot 생태계와의 통합을 우선순위로 해야 한다. 또한 브랜드의 제품 정보를 Microsoft의 에이전트 시스템이 쉽게 이해할 수 있도록 구조화된 데이터(schema)를 최적화해야 한다.
D2C brands should prioritize integration with Microsoft's advertising network (Microsoft Ads, Bing Ads) and Copilot ecosystem. Additionally, optimize structured product data (schema) to ensure Microsoft's agentic systems can easily understand and recommend your products in natural language interactions.

AI Shopping Tools Gain Traction, But Retailer Pushback Could Cloud 2026 Progress

eMarketer의 최신 분석에 따르면, AI 쇼핑 도구는 소비자 수용이 증가하고 있지만 소매업체의 저항이 시장 성장을 제한할 수 있다는 우려가 제기되고 있다. 데이터 소유권, 마진 압박, 고객 관계 통제 상실에 대한 우려가 많은 전통 소매업체들의 채택을 지연시키고 있다. 2026년의 시장 성장률은 초기 예측보다 낮을 수 있으며, 기술과 규제 문제가 주요 병목 현상이 될 것으로 예상된다.
eMarketer's latest analysis reveals that while AI shopping tools are gaining consumer traction, retailer pushback threatens to slow market growth. Concerns about data ownership, margin compression, and loss of customer relationship control are delaying adoption among traditional retailers. 2026 market growth may fall short of earlier predictions, with technology integration and regulatory challenges emerging as key bottlenecks.
  • Consumer demand for AI shopping tools is strong, but retailer resistance to data loss and margin compression is slowing adoption
  • First-mover D2C brands can establish customer preference for their agentic experiences before large retailers catch up
  • Regulatory clarity on data privacy and AI transparency may emerge as a competitive differentiator
💡 So What
D2C 브랜드들은 대형 소매업체의 저항을 기회로 보고, 자체 에이전트 기술을 먼저 도입하는 경쟁 우위를 확보할 수 있다. 소비자들이 AI 쇼핑 경험을 갈망하고 있지만 전통 소매업체가 뒤처지는 만큼, 혁신적인 D2C 플레이어들이 시장 점유율을 빼앗을 수 있는 황금 기회다.
D2C brands should view retailer hesitancy as an opportunity to gain first-mover advantage in proprietary agentic technology. With consumers craving AI-powered shopping experiences while traditional retailers lag, innovative D2C players can capture market share and customer loyalty during this transition window.

The Truth about ‘Direct’ Traffic

구글 애널리틱스와 다른 플랫폼에서 보고되는 직접 트래픽이 잘못 분류되고 오해의 소지가 있을 수 있습니다. 직접 트래픽 데이터가 실제로는 부정확하고 심지어 해로울 수 있다는 진실이 밝혀졌습니다. 이커머스 업체들이 트래픽 분석에서 주의해야 할 중요한 이슈입니다.
Direct traffic reported by Google Analytics and other platforms might be mislabeled, misleading, and potentially detrimental. The truth about direct traffic data reveals it can be inaccurate and even harmful. This is a critical issue that ecommerce businesses need to be careful about in traffic analysis.
  • 구글 애널리틱스의 직접 트래픽 분류가 부정확할 수 있음
  • 직접 트래픽 데이터가 오해를 불러일으키고 해로울 수 있음
  • 정확한 트래픽 분석을 위한 대안적 접근 방법 필요
💡 So What
D2C 기업은 직접 트래픽 데이터를 맹신하지 말고 다양한 분석 도구와 방법을 활용해 정확한 고객 유입 경로를 파악해야 합니다.
D2C companies should not blindly trust direct traffic data but use various analytics tools and methods to identify accurate customer acquisition paths.
